title: Assam Elections: BJP releases second list of two candidates from Dalgaon, Sissirborgaon
description: The BJP has fielded Jiban Gogoi from Sissirborgaon and Sushri Krishna Saha from the Dalgaon seat. This takes the BJP's total tally of candidates to 90, after the party released the first list of 88 candidates on March 19.
